hooks.command: python -c "import pathlib, runpy, subprocess, sys; root = subprocess.check_output(['git', 'rev-parse', '--show-toplevel'], text=True, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace').strip(); script = str(pathlib.Path(root) / '.codex/hooks/code_review_graph.py'); sys.argv = [script, 'session-start']; runpy.run_path(script, run_name='__main__')"

python -c "import pathlib, runpy, subprocess, sys; root = subprocess.check_output(['git', 'rev-parse', '--show-toplevel'], text=True, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace').strip(); script = str(pathlib.Path(root) / '.codex/hooks/code_review_graph.py'); sys.argv = [script, 'update']; runpy.run_path(script, run_name='__main__')"

python -c "import pathlib, runpy, subprocess, sys; root = subprocess.check_output(['git', 'rev-parse', '--show-toplevel'], text=True, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace').strip(); script = str(pathlib.Path(root) / '.codex/hooks/code_review_graph.py'); sys.argv = [script, 'permission-request']; runpy.run_path(script, run_name='__main__')"
